# Afanyu Emmanuel — Software Developer

> Product-minded software developer based in Kigali, Rwanda, who turns complex problems into practical, scalable solutions that deliver real-world value.

## About

Afanyu Emmanuel is a software developer specializing in web and mobile applications. From concept to deployment, he focuses on building scalable, reliable, and user-centered products. His work combines technical development with data-driven problem solving, shaped by research in Financial Behavior Intelligence Models for Financial Inclusion — a fintech initiative applying AI and data analytics to improve financial access for underserved populations.

## Projects

- [Zyra — Luxury Leather Goods Platform](https://afanyu.netlify.app/projects/zyra): Full-stack platform digitising production lifecycle of a luxury leather goods brand with digital twin traceability, OTP-based activation, and a public store.
- [DiaCare — Diabetes Care System](https://afanyu.netlify.app/projects/diacare): Multi-role healthcare platform with real-time WebSocket chat, SOS emergency escalation, glucose tracking, and role-based dashboards.
- [FAC Ltd — Corporate Website](https://afanyu.netlify.app/projects/fac-ltd): Trilingual (English, French, Kinyarwanda) corporate site with browser language detection, a blog system, and SEO-optimised pages.

## Skills & Stack

React, Tailwind CSS, Flutter, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Docker, Firebase, Figma, Python, Java
